meta.metric: modifiable dementia risk factors — national adult prevalence + PAF
meta.note: PAF=P(RR-1)/(1+P(RR-1)); composite=1-Π(1-PAF) over factors present, independence-assumed. Up to 5 of the Livingston 2024 modifiable factors at national level — a floor, not the full ~45%. n_factors varies: NCD-RisC covers all ~200 for BP/diabetes/obesity; WHO GHO smoking/inactivity may be absent for some.
